title: PointerFile
description: Mutable channel pointer (stable.json / latest.json / canary.json). Flipped atomically on promotion. Consumers poll this file and reload when version_id changes.

project.description: Tenant/project identifier under a category (e.g. product_DQ). Replaces the legacy app_id.

model_name.description: Logical model name within a project (e.g. sentiment_analysis).

version.description: Numeric version. Maps 1:1 to the v{N} folder suffix.

version_id.description: String form of version (v1, v2, ...). Redundant with `version` for human readability.

run_id.description: MLflow run id that produced this artifact.

registry_version.description: MLflow Model Registry version number for the registered model.

manifest_uri.description: Absolute S3 URI of the immutable manifest.json for this version.

mlflow_tracking_uri.description: MLflow tracking server URL at promotion time. Captured because servers move.

mlflow_run_url.description: Deep link to the run in the MLflow UI.

mlflow_model_url.description: Deep link to the registered model version in the MLflow UI.
